title: Custom tool server rejects 'search_pattern' parameter
symptom: When connecting n8n to a custom tool server, an error occurs stating 'additionalProperties ‘search_pattern’ not allowed'. This indicates a parameter mismatch.
not_this_if: The custom tool server is configured to accept 'search_pattern'
root_cause: The error occurs because n8n sends a 'search_pattern' parameter that the custom tool server's API schema does not recognize. This mismatch leads to validation failures when n8n tries to communicate with the server.
fix_steps: Update the schema of your custom tool server to accept 'search_pattern'.
Add 'search_pattern' as an optional property in the schema, e.g., '"search_pattern": {"type": "string"}'
Restart the custom tool server if necessary.
agent_instruction: Modify your custom tool server's schema to include 'search_pattern' as an optional property.
